Mobile App

Workout
Tracker

A Flutter fitness app to log sets, reps, and weight for fully custom exercises, with bodyweight tracking and graphs to visualize your progress over time.

Flutter Dart SQLite fl_chart Mobile
scroll

Desktop Widget

Phone &
Bridge

A Quickshell widget that mirrors Android battery level and notifications directly onto a Linux desktop over Bluetooth. no internet, no cables.

Quickshell Go Android Studio Bluetooth Linux
Live Demo ↗ GitHub ↗

Simulation

Game
of Life

An implementation of Conway's Game of Life built in C++ with SDL2. A zero-player cellular automaton rendered in real time with interactive cell toggling and simulation controls.

C++ SDL2 Simulation
Live Demo ↗ GitHub ↗

Computer Vision/Image Processing

ASCII
Filter

ascii filter for images, video or webcam

C++ OpenCV
Live Demo ↗ GitHub ↗

Automation

Instagram
Rotator

A Python script that automatically rotates your Instagram profile picture at a set time interval — no manual uploads, just drop in your images and let it run.

Python Instagram API Automation
GitHub ↗
